prompt: Solo-dev repo card APP-9 is done. Its artifact baseline records completion commit abc123 and links docs/briefs/APP-9.md plus docs/specs/APP-9.md. A later commit materially changes the linked spec. Explain the gate decision and exact resolution options before any work resumes from APP-9.
assertions: Blocks resume or authority use for APP-9 because a linked artifact differs from the completion commit
Proposes new versioned docs and a follow-up card linked back to APP-9
Proposes reopening APP-9 and rerunning verification for changed completed scope
Allows baseline advancement only after explicit human classification as editorial
Does not silently replace the completion commit
Uses the supplied path-scoped completion commit rather than replacing it with a mandatory per-file SHA baseline
Blocks only use of APP-9 as authority while leaving unrelated cards and unlinked work available
